prompt: Show the average attendance score for each course

inputData.question: Show the average attendance score for each course

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the average attendance score for each course"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the average attendance score for each course"},"startedAt":1771803591241,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Join courses -> course_sections -> enrollments -> grades and compute the average of grades.attendance_score per course; order by course code for deterministic output. Only non-null attendance_score values are included by AVG().","sql":"SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score
FROM public.courses c
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code;","assumptions":["attendance_score is stored in public.grades.attendance_score (numeric) as discovered in the schema inspection","Average should exclude NULL attendance_score values (AVG() default behavior)","Return only courses that have at least one associated grade with a non-null attendance_score"]},"endedAt":1771803630770},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score
FROM public.courses c
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code;"},"startedAt":1771803630778,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

FROM public.courses c
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY visualization.description: Average attendance score for each course
visualization.title: Average Attendance Score by Course

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score
FROM public.courses c
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code;

visualization.description: Average attendance score for each course
visualization.title: Average Attendance Score by Course

result.sql:
SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score
FROM public.courses c
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code;
